series_metadata.series_description: Studies/Projects are conducted on ploicy strategies and key issues affecting the Division, including supplies and equipment, recruitment strategies, traffic and safety statistics, the effects of traffic laws, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain permanently. ; Electronic: Retain permanently. ; Paper: After 1998 retain hard copies for five years then place in electronic data files., Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper
